definition:
1. to put in beside, insert, interpolate, interpose , τι (Aristophanes Comicus); π. ὑποψίας to insinuate  suspicions, (Aeschines Orator) 
2. to put  the auxiliaries in line with  the legionaries, (Polybius Historicus) 
3. intransitive to fall into line, to encamp , (Polybius Historicus) (ML)
